news.title: 🇪🇸 pedro sánchez is positioning himself as a leader of a global socialist revival, vowing to “twist
news.summary:
🇪🇸 pedro sánchez is positioning himself as a leader of a global socialist revival, vowing to “twist the arms” of far-right forces.

according to politico, sánchez used a left-wing summit in barcelona to 랠리 key leftist leaders against the rise of the far right and to strengthen his international profile.

at the summit, he accused donald 트럼프 of under채굴 multilateral institutions through 관세s and the war in the middle east. 

he also claimed that while far-right groups are organizing internationally, their numbers reflect “weakness,” not strength.

sánchez is reportedly seeking to expand his influence in europe and is eyeing the position of president of the european council, currently held by antónio costa.

news.title: softer al jazeera coverage in 거래소 for fewer iranian strikes? inside the alleged qatar–iran backchann
news.summary:
softer al jazeera coverage in 거래소 for fewer iranian strikes? inside the alleged qatar–iran backchannel deal

in recent days, reports have intensified about a possible behind-the-scenes understanding between qatar and iran in the final phase of the war—one that allegedly led to a reduction in iranian strikes, particularly after the major gas facility in northern qatar was hit.

however, a government source from a regional country reported that quiet dialogue did take place between qatar and iran, contributing to a noticeable drop in iranian strikes on doha compared to other gulf states in the closing days of the conflict.

according to the same source, iran also sought a less confrontational editorial line from al jazeera, along with greater airtime for iranian voices—reflecting the channel’s strategic importance for reaching arab and global audiences. this shift, the source claims, was indeed visible during the war.

one notable example is iranian analyst hassan ahmadian of the university of tehran, who appeared on both al jazeera’s arabic and english broadcasts.

이더리움 foundation-backed 'ketman' uncovers 100 north korean hackers infiltrating 암호화폐 projects

accord
news.summary:
이더리움 foundation-backed 'ketman' uncovers 100 north korean hackers infiltrating 암호화폐 projects

according to @_forab, a recent 이더리움 foundation grant review highlighted "ketman," a project dedicated to hunting down north korean hackers infiltrating the 암호화폐 industry. the team reached out to roughly 53 projects, uncovering around 100 active dprk it workers. these operatives typically forge japanese ids to land remote web3 tech gigs. ketman is now actively assisting 암호화폐 teams in setting up "honeypots" during the interview phase to weed out these bad actors.

news.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 the most effective strategy currently available to the administration would be to simply walk a
news.summary:
🇺🇸🇮🇷 the most effective strategy currently available to the administration would be to simply walk away from a deal that isn't working.

a blockade is currently in place that is causing significant damage and creating new adversaries for the u.s. globally.

professor steve hanke points out that the "madman theory" of attacking and denying only works if it eventually leads to a verifiable victory.

by forcing the rest of the world to figure out the strait of hormuz on their own, the u.s. could potentially avoid further economic ramifications.
@steve_hanke

video
  




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇺🇸🇮🇱 the state of the economy is currently worse than during previous assessments, primarily due to the unaccounted costs of the ongoing conflict.

when the office of management and budget was asked for the bottom-line cost of the war with iran, the director admitted they had no idea.

professor steve hanke observes that while a 60-day ceasefire period is technically in place, the probability of sabotage remains high due to regional spoilers.

until there is a signed and delivered agreement, the markets remain in a state of reaction to an increasingly incoherent diploMATIC reality.
@steve_hanke

news.title: 속보: the 연준eral reserve reported an operating loss of -$18.7 billion in 2025, marking its 3rd consecu
news.summary:
속보: the 연준eral reserve reported an operating loss of -$18.7 billion in 2025, marking its 3rd consecutive annual loss.

this brings the total 3-year loss to -$210.3 billion after the -$77.6 billion recorded in 2024 and -$114.0 billion in 2023.

the losses are primarily driven by the 연준 paying out more in interest to banks and money market funds than it earns from its bond and mbs holdings.

since the losses began in september 2022, the 연준 has stopped remitting income to the treasury department, ending a streak that totaled +$1.36 trillion since 2008.

however, the 연준 cannot become inSOLvent because it quite lite랠리 creates its own money.

truly incredible.

news.summary:
지금 이란 관련 헤드라인들 범람하는데,  결론은 하나야. 

지금 미국이랑 협상하는 쪽은 이란 외교부 라인인데, 여기는 협상하고 싶어해.  

그런데 지금 이란 실세는 군부인데, 여기는 막가파야.   

그래서 무슨 협상 재기니, 임박이니 그런 헤드라인은 외교부랑 이야기 해서 나오는거고, 

계속 봉쇄니 지상전 가능성 올라가느니 어쩌구는 군부쪽이야. 

이거 2개가 동시에 나오고 있어서 머가리 뜨거운 상황이야.  

결론만 딱 말하면, 금요일 보다는 상황이 나빠진게 맞아.  

안다스탠?

news.title: mordechai anielewicz was the leader of the jewish combat organization during the warsaw ghetto upris
news.summary:
mordechai anielewicz was the leader of the jewish combat organization during the warsaw ghetto uprising.

this was the largest jewish resistance movement during wwii.

though the uprising was doomed , anielewicz inspired further rebellions in both ghettos and extermination camps!

news.title: “honestly, it was not about fighting for survival, it was simply our fight against them. it was our
news.summary:
“honestly, it was not about fighting for survival, it was simply our fight against them. it was our fight for dignity. primarily for dignified death. the death on my own terms, based on my rules.” marek edelman

edelman was the last surviving leader of the warsaw ghetto uprising.

he then fought in the general warsaw uprising of 1944, attempting to liberate the city from the nazis.

after the war, he remained in poland. he not only became a noted cardiologist but became an activist in the polish anti-communist underground movement - SOLidarność.

more than 1000 lightly arm
news.summary:
today is the anniversary of the outbreak of the warsaw ghetto uprising. 

more than 1000 lightly armed jews took to arms to fight back against nazi germany after having witnessed deportations to death camps for months

rest in peace heroes. never again!
